subject: Molyneux complaint-Charles Miller
body:
Jeffrey, 
I have read the  complaint and as requested by Rich Kahn I am prepared to 
discuss it with  you. 
I am at my office both  Saturday and Sunday should you wish to reach me over 
the weekend and all day  Monday 
Charles 
Office #  914-488-5203 
below  my  notes 
Issue  
Damages incurred by  Client  
Claims against  Molyneux   
Did  he represent himself as a reputed architect and interior  designer?  
Client 
·         had specific vision of home  and other facilities and sought to 
find an architect with experience,  artistry and skill  in  neoclassical design 
who would completely design for permit and  construction the home   
Did  Molyneux inform client? 
·         he had studied at Ecole des  Beaux Arts and represented himself as 
an  Architect  
Did  Molyneux  
    *   show  blue prints of other projects representing that they were the 
level of  detail client could expect with abundant detail of interior and 
exterior  designs sufficient to provide all detail necessary for permit, bid,  
award and build?
Did  Molyneux misrepresent  in that he; 
    *   Led client to believe he  understood and would; 
    *   deliver designs and construction documents in  keeping with clients 
vision? 
    *   provide designs and construction  documents in accordance with 
applicable building codes and rules and  regulations of all agencies having 
jurisdiction over the  work? 
    *   provide to Clients engineers  detailed construction drawings for them 
to coordinate and  incorporate   in to  their engineering drawings? 
    *   Provide required designs and construction  documents in a reasonable 
time to allow work to progress and client to  obtain early utilization and 
enjoyment of the facility to be  constructed?
At the  time of employment of Molyneux did he fail  to disclose and  did  he 
otherwise conceal material facts? 
    *   Not a  licensed architect within the United States and Virgin  
Islands 
    *   Did  not have the requisite knowledge of the applicable codes and  
regulations 
    *   Did  not intend to perform the requisite design and architectural  
services 
    *   Did  not intend to follow the clients design  vision
As of  March 7 2008 Molyneux has failed to 
    *   Provide designs according to clients  requirements 
    *   Failed  to develop construction documents
As of  March 6 Molyneux 
·         has required client to  employ others to develop details for 
construction drawings,  details Did Molyneux allege they would be provided by  them? 
An  example of unacceptable design  was proposed Office structure  Air 
conditioning  
·         located Air outlets in base  counter to engineering criteria 
recommended by clients  engineers  
Were  selections of finish materials for exterior of office building?   
·         not as per clients vision  for stone, or roofing materials

body_html:
Jeffrey,

 

I have read the complaint and as requested by Rich Kahn I am prepared to discuss it with you.

 

I am at my office both Saturday and Sunday should you wish to reach me over the weekend and all day Monday

 

Charles

 

Office # 914-488-5203

 

below  my notes

 

 

Issue

Damages incurred by Client

Claims against Molyneux

Did he represent himself as a reputed architect and interior designer?

 

 

Client

·        had specific vision of home and other facilities and sought to find an architect with experience, artistry and skill  in neoclassical design who would completely design for permit and construction the home

 

 

Did Molyneux inform client?

 

·        he had studied at Ecole des Beaux Arts and represented himself as an Architect

 

 

Did Molyneux

  • show blue prints of other projects representing that they were the level of detail client could expect with abundant detail of interior and exterior designs sufficient to provide all detail necessary for permit, bid, award and build?

 

 

Did Molyneux misrepresent  in that he;

 

 

  •  Led client to believe he understood and would;
  • deliver designs and construction documents in keeping with clients vision?
  •  provide designs and construction documents in accordance with applicable building codes and rules and regulations of all agencies having jurisdiction over the work?
  •  provide to Clients engineers detailed construction drawings for them to coordinate and incorporate   in to their engineering drawings?
  • Provide required designs and construction documents in a reasonable time to allow work to progress and client to obtain early utilization and enjoyment of the facility to be constructed?

 

 

 

At the time of employment of Molyneux did he fail  to disclose and  did he otherwise conceal material facts?

 

  • Not a licensed architect within the United States and Virgin Islands
  • Did not have the requisite knowledge of the applicable codes and regulations
  • Did not intend to perform the requisite design and architectural services
  • Did not intend to follow the clients design vision

 

 

As of March 7 2008 Molyneux has failed to

  • Provide designs according to clients requirements
  • Failed to develop construction documents

 

 

 

 

As of March 6 Molyneux

·        has required client to employ others to develop details for construction drawings, details Did Molyneux allege they would be provided by them?

 

 

 

An example of unacceptable design  was proposed Office structure Air conditioning

·        located Air outlets in base counter to engineering criteria recommended by clients engineers

 

 

Were selections of finish materials for exterior of office building?

·        not as per clients vision for stone, or roofing materials
